title: Test Writer Result
description: Result schema for the test-writer role. The test writer creates or updates tests within test_paths.

status.description: Whether test writing finished or is blocked.

summary.description: One paragraph summary of tests written.

test_files_created.description: Relative paths to test files created or modified.

coverage_targets.description: Source symbols or paths targeted by the tests (e.g., 'src/auth.py::validate_token').

test_count.description: Total number of test cases written.

edge_cases_covered.description: Edge cases explicitly tested (e.g., 'empty input', 'expired token', 'malformed JWT').

examples.summary: Added 12 tests covering JWT validation, token refresh, and error handling for expired and malformed tokens.
